member.name: T:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.BrowserAIChatCapability
member.summary: AI chat capability for Browser AI provider.

member.name: M:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.BrowserAIChatCapability.#ctor(Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.BrowserAIProvider)
member.summary: AI chat capability for Browser AI provider.

member.name: T:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.BrowserAIChatClient
member.summary: Chat client that uses the browser-based job queue for AI processing.

member.name: M:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.BrowserAIChatClient.#ctor(Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.IBrowserAIJobStore,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.BrowserAIProviderSettings,System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.AI.IChatClient)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.BrowserAIJobCleanupService
member.summary: Background service that periodically purges expired jobs from the store.

member.name: M:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.BrowserAIJobCleanupService.#ctor(Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.IBrowserAIJobStore,Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.BrowserAIProviderSettings},Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.BrowserAIJobCleanupService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.BrowserAIProvider
member.summary: AI provider for Browser-based AI services (Gemini Nano via self.ai).
member.remarks: This provider routes inference requests to Chrome's built-in browser AI. The browser runs the model locally; the server acts as a job queue. A Service Worker handles execution so the browser tab does not need to stay open.

member.name: M:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.BrowserAIProvider.#ctor(Umbraco.AI.Core.Providers.IAIProviderInfrastructure,Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.IBrowserAIJobStore,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.BrowserAIProvider})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The job store for managing browser AI jobs.

member.name: P:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.BrowserAIProvider.JobStore
member.summary: Gets the job store for this provider.

member.name: P:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.BrowserAIProvider.Logger
member.summary: Gets the logger for this provider.

member.name: T:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.BrowserAIProviderSettings
member.summary: Settings for the Browser AI provider.

member.name: P:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.BrowserAIProviderSettings.Enabled
member.summary: Whether the Browser AI provider is enabled.

member.name: P:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.BrowserAIProviderSettings.TimeoutSeconds
member.summary: Timeout in seconds for waiting for browser response.

member.name: P:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.BrowserAIProviderSettings.MaxJobAgeSeconds
member.summary: Maximum age in seconds for jobs before they are purged.

member.name: P:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.BrowserAIProviderSettings.FallbackProviderId
member.summary: Optional fallback provider ID to use when browser AI times out.

member.name: T:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.BrowserAIServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering Browser AI services.

member.name: M:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.BrowserAIServiceCollectionExtensions.AddBrowserAI(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds Browser AI services to the service collection.

member.name: T:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Controllers.BrowserAIController
member.summary: API controller for Browser AI job management.

member.name: M:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Controllers.BrowserAIController.#ctor(Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.IBrowserAIJobStore,Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.BrowserAIProviderSettings},Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Controllers.BrowserAIController})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Controllers.BrowserAIController.GetStatus
member.summary: Health check endpoint - no auth required.

member.name: M:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Controllers.BrowserAIController.GetNextJob
member.summary: Gets the next pending job for processing.

member.name: M:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Controllers.BrowserAIController.PostResult(System.String,Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.JobResultRequest)
member.summary: Posts the result of a completed job.

member.name: M:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Controllers.BrowserAIController.PostError(System.String,Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.JobErrorRequest)
member.summary: Posts an error for a failed job.

member.name: T:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.IBrowserAIJobStore
member.summary: Store for managing Browser AI jobs.

member.name: M:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.IBrowserAIJobStore.CreateJobAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new job with the specified prompt and operation type.

member.name: M:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.IBrowserAIJobStore.GetNextPendingJobAsync
member.summary: Gets the next pending job and marks it as processing.
member.returns: The next pending job, or null if none available.

member.name: M:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.IBrowserAIJobStore.GetJobAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a job by its ID.
member.returns: The job, or null if not found.

member.name: M:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.IBrowserAIJobStore.MarkCompleteAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Marks a job as complete with the specified result.

member.name: M:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.IBrowserAIJobStore.MarkFailedAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Marks a job as failed with the specified error.

member.name: M:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.IBrowserAIJobStore.PurgeExpiredJobsAsync(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Removes jobs older than the specified age.
member.param: Maximum age for jobs to keep.

member.name: T:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.InMemoryBrowserAIJobStore
member.summary: In-memory implementation of .
member.remarks: Thread-safe implementation using ConcurrentDictionary. Note: Jobs are lost when the application restarts.

member.name: T:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.BrowserAIJob
member.summary: Represents a job to be processed by browser-based AI.

member.name: P:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.BrowserAIJob.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier for the job.

member.name: P:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.BrowserAIJob.Prompt
member.summary: The full prompt text to process.

member.name: P:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.BrowserAIJob.OperationType
member.summary: The type of operation (e.g., "chat", "summarize", "translate").

member.name: P:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.BrowserAIJob.Status
member.summary: Current status of the job.

member.name: P:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.BrowserAIJob.Result
member.summary: The result text, populated when job completes successfully.

member.name: P:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.BrowserAIJob.Error
member.summary: Error message, populated when job fails.

member.name: P:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.BrowserAIJob.CreatedAt
member.summary: When the job was created.

member.name: P:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.BrowserAIJob.CompletedAt
member.summary: When the job completed (successfully or with failure).

member.name: T:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.BrowserAIJobStatus
member.summary: Status of a Browser AI job.

member.name: F:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.BrowserAIJobStatus.Pending
member.summary: Job is waiting to be picked up by a browser.

member.name: F:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.BrowserAIJobStatus.Processing
member.summary: Job is currently being processed by a browser.

member.name: F:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.BrowserAIJobStatus.Complete
member.summary: Job completed successfully.

member.name: F:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.BrowserAIJobStatus.Failed
member.summary: Job failed with an error.

member.name: F:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.BrowserAIJobStatus.TimedOut
member.summary: Job timed out waiting for browser response.

member.name: T:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.JobErrorRequest
member.summary: Request body for posting job error.

member.name: P:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.JobErrorRequest.Error
member.summary: The error message from browser AI processing.

member.name: T:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.JobResponse
member.summary: Response body for job details sent to browser.

member.name: P:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.JobResponse.Id
member.summary: The job ID.

member.name: P:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.JobResponse.Prompt
member.summary: The prompt text to process.

member.name: P:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.JobResponse.OperationType
member.summary: The operation type (e.g., "chat", "summarize", "translate").

member.name: T:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.JobResultRequest
member.summary: Request body for posting job result.

member.name: P:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.JobResultRequest.Result
member.summary: The result text from browser AI processing.

member.name: T:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.StatusResponse
member.summary: Response body for status endpoint.

member.name: P:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.StatusResponse.Available
member.summary: Whether the Browser AI service is available.

member.name: P:Umbraco.AI.BrowserAI.Models.StatusResponse.Version
member.summary: Version of the Browser AI provider.
